final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fine-art-reproduction
Asset type: traditional Chinese scroll painting, panoramic composition
Primary request: "百鸟朝凤图" (Hundred Birds Paying Homage to the Phoenix) in traditional Chinese gongbi zhongcai (meticulous brushwork with heavy colors) style
Scene/backdrop: ethereal immortal realm with misty mountains, auspicious clouds and rosy dawn light, ancient pines and cypresses, exotic flowers and rare plants scattered throughout
Subject: central pair of phoenixes soaring with spread wings - male phoenix in vermillion red, golden yellow and emerald green plumage; female phoenix in pink-purple, silver-white and azure blue plumage, responding to each other among clouds; surrounded by dozens of rare birds including peacocks with fanned tails, dancing cranes, golden pheasants foraging, playful parrots, each bird with distinct posture and lifelike presence
Style/medium: traditional Chinese gongbi zhongcai painting, meticulous fine brushwork with heavy mineral pigments, delicate flowing line work, rich and magnificent color palette, gold powder outlining feather details
Composition/framing: panoramic scroll composition, grand and majestic scale, phoenix pair as focal center with birds radiating outward in layered arrangement
Lighting/mood: soft diffused celestial light through auspicious clouds, serene and sublime atmosphere conveying prosperity and good fortune
Color palette: vermillion red, golden yellow, emerald green, pink-purple, silver-white, azure blue, mineral pigments with gold accents on a warm cream silk ground
Materials/textures: fine silk texture, layered mineral pigments with slight sheen, delicate ink outlines, gold leaf details on feathers, traditional mounting style
Text (verbatim): "百鸟朝凤图"
Constraints: preserve traditional Chinese painting techniques and cultural symbolism of prosperity and auspiciousness, maintain the hierarchical composition with phoenixes as central figures
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, Western perspective, modern digital effects, watercolor washes instead of layered pigments, cartoonish simplification
